sqlMap.select: select * from NonMonetaryCompensation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into NonMonetaryCompensation(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ClientNameNmc PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc ClientIndustryNmcKey ServiceIndustryNmcKey PercentageOfInvestmentNmc ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ClientNameNmc# #PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc# #ClientIndustryNmcKey# #ServiceIndustryNmcKey# #PercentageOfInvestmentNmc# )
sqlMap.select: select ClientNameNmc, PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc, ClientIndustryNmcKey, ServiceIndustryNmcKey, PercentageOfInvestmentNmc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from NonMonetaryCompensation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update NonMonetaryCompensation set
ClientNameNmc = #ClientNameNmc# ClientNameNmc = null PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc = #PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc# PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc = null ClientIndustryNmcKey = #ClientIndustryNmcKey# ClientIndustryNmcKey = null ServiceIndustryNmcKey = #ServiceIndustryNmcKey# ServiceIndustryNmcKey = null PercentageOfInvestmentNmc = #PercentageOfInvestmentNmc# PercentageOfInvestmentNmc = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from NonMonetaryCompensation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from NonMonetaryCompensation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ClientNameNmc, PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc, ClientIndustryNmcKey, ServiceIndustryNmcKey, PercentageOfInvestmentNmc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from NonMonetaryCompensation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ClientNameNmc, PercentofRevenueFromClientNmc, ClientIndustryNmcKey, ServiceIndustryNmcKey, PercentageOfInvestmentNmc from NonMonetaryCompensation where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
